_meta.description: Manually maintained political inputs. Update from RCP / Silver Bulletin / 538 weekly. The model reads from here directly. Auto-fetch is deferred to Phase 2 because aggregator scraping is fragile.

most_important_problem_economy_pct.note: Combined economy + inflation + cost of living

structural_2026_midterm.note: Senate Class II is heavily R-leaning in 2026 (22 R defending vs 11 D defending), which structurally limits the size of any Dem wave in Senate even if national environment is D+5.

structural_2028_presidential.note: Trump term-limited. 2028 is open seat → DPER=0 (no personal incumbency boost), DUR=0 (only 1 consecutive term). This removes ~3-4pp of structural advantage from Republican party vote share vs counterfactual where Trump could run.
